Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 13 

BENE_BIRTH_DT 

LABEL: Beneficiary Birth Date 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary birth date. 

LONG NAME: BENE_BIRTH_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: Format: DDMONYYYY (e.g., 04MAY1951) 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary was successfully linked to Medicare claims data, the date of birth from the Medicare 
enrollment files was used. If the beneficiary
